---
title: "Repositorio de Teorías del Cambio"
description: "200 teorías del cambio de organizaciones internacionales, calificadas con el Índice de Madurez IMToC"
toc: false
---

```{=html}
<script src="toc_data.js"></script>

<!-- ============================================================
     HERO
     ============================================================ -->
<div class="page-header vi-header">
  <div class="page-header-content">
    <div class="page-badge">Centro Valor Público &middot; EAFIT</div>
    <h1 class="page-title">Repositorio de Teorías del Cambio</h1>
    <p class="page-subtitle">
      Un banco de <strong>200 Teorías del Cambio</strong> de organizaciones líderes a nivel global,
      calificadas con el <strong>Índice de Madurez IMToC</strong> — una herramienta para construir,
      revisar y fortalecer su propia Teoría del Cambio.
    </p>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ============================================================
     KPIs
     ============================================================ -->
<div class="content-section">
<div class="content-inner">

<div class="kpi-grid">
  <div class="kpi-card">
    <div class="kpi-num">200</div>
    <div class="kpi-label">Teorías del Cambio en el repositorio</div>
  </div>
  <div class="kpi-card">
    <div class="kpi-num">78</div>
    <div class="kpi-label">ToC calificadas con IMToC</div>
  </div>
  <div class="kpi-card">
    <div class="kpi-num">38.8</div>
    <div class="kpi-label">Puntaje promedio IMToC / 100</div>
  </div>
  <div class="kpi-card">
    <div class="kpi-num">29</div>
    <div class="kpi-label">Sectores representados</div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
</div>

<!-- ============================================================
     IMTOC FRAMEWORK
     ============================================================ -->
<div class="content-section alt">
<div class="content-inner">

<span class="section-label">La herramienta de diagnóstico</span>
<h2 class="section-heading">Índice de Madurez de la Teoría del Cambio (IMToC)</h2>

<p>
  El IMToC evalúa cualquier Teoría del Cambio en <strong>10 dimensiones</strong> agrupadas en
  tres dominios. El puntaje total (0–100 puntos) determina el nivel de madurez, desde una
  Proto-ToC hasta una ToC Robusta. Este repositorio es el punto de referencia: le permite
  comparar su ToC con las mejores prácticas globales y saber exactamente dónde invertir para avanzar.
</p>

<div class="imtoc-domains">

  <div class="imtoc-domain imtoc-domain--a">
    <div class="imtoc-domain-header">
      <span class="imtoc-domain-tag">Dominio A</span>
      <span class="imtoc-domain-pts">30 pts</span>
    </div>
    <div class="imtoc-domain-title">Causal</div>
    <div class="imtoc-dims">
      <div class="imtoc-dim"><span class="imtoc-dim-code">A1</span> Cadena causal <span class="imtoc-dim-pts">10</span></div>
      <div class="imtoc-dim"><span class="imtoc-dim-code">A2</span> Outcomes específicos <span class="imtoc-dim-pts">10</span></div>
      <div class="imtoc-dim"><span class="imtoc-dim-code">A3</span> Diferenciación por población <span class="imtoc-dim-pts">10</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="imtoc-domain imtoc-domain--b">
    <div class="imtoc-domain-header">
      <span class="imtoc-domain-tag">Dominio B</span>
      <span class="imtoc-domain-pts">40 pts</span>
    </div>
    <div class="imtoc-domain-title">Epistémico</div>
    <div class="imtoc-dims">
      <div class="imtoc-dim"><span class="imtoc-dim-code">B1</span> Supuestos explícitos <span class="imtoc-dim-pts">10</span></div>
      <div class="imtoc-dim"><span class="imtoc-dim-code">B2</span> Evidencia de soporte <span class="imtoc-dim-pts">10</span></div>
      <div class="imtoc-dim"><span class="imtoc-dim-code">B3</span> Indicadores verificables <span class="imtoc-dim-pts">10</span></div>
      <div class="imtoc-dim"><span class="imtoc-dim-code">B4</span> Horizonte temporal <span class="imtoc-dim-pts">10</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="imtoc-domain imtoc-domain--c">
    <div class="imtoc-domain-header">
      <span class="imtoc-domain-tag">Dominio C</span>
      <span class="imtoc-domain-pts">30 pts</span>
    </div>
    <div class="imtoc-domain-title">Completitud</div>
    <div class="imtoc-dims">
      <div class="imtoc-dim"><span class="imtoc-dim-code">C1</span> Participación stakeholders <span class="imtoc-dim-pts">10</span></div>
      <div class="imtoc-dim"><span class="imtoc-dim-code">C2</span> Efectos negativos <span class="imtoc-dim-pts">10</span></div>
      <div class="imtoc-dim"><span class="imtoc-dim-code">C3</span> Claridad y comunicación <span class="imtoc-dim-pts">10</span></div>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>

<!-- Niveles -->
<div class="imtoc-levels">
  <div class="imtoc-level imtoc-level--n1">
    <div class="imtoc-level-band">N1</div>
    <div class="imtoc-level-name">Proto-ToC</div>
    <div class="imtoc-level-range">0–20 pts</div>
    <div class="imtoc-level-count" id="cnt-n1">14 en el corpus</div>
  </div>
  <div class="imtoc-level imtoc-level--n2">
    <div class="imtoc-level-band">N2</div>
    <div class="imtoc-level-name">ToC Básica</div>
    <div class="imtoc-level-range">21–40 pts</div>
    <div class="imtoc-level-count" id="cnt-n2">26 en el corpus</div>
  </div>
  <div class="imtoc-level imtoc-level--n3">
    <div class="imtoc-level-band">N3</div>
    <div class="imtoc-level-name">ToC Desarrollada</div>
    <div class="imtoc-level-range">41–60 pts</div>
    <div class="imtoc-level-count" id="cnt-n3">36 en el corpus</div>
  </div>
  <div class="imtoc-level imtoc-level--n4">
    <div class="imtoc-level-band">N4</div>
    <div class="imtoc-level-name">ToC Robusta</div>
    <div class="imtoc-level-range">61–80 pts</div>
    <div class="imtoc-level-count" id="cnt-n4">2 en el corpus</div>
  </div>
  <div class="imtoc-level imtoc-level--n5">
    <div class="imtoc-level-band">N5</div>
    <div class="imtoc-level-name">ToC Ejemplar</div>
    <div class="imtoc-level-range">81–100 pts</div>
    <div class="imtoc-level-count">0 en el corpus</div>
  </div>
</div>

<p class="imtoc-insight">
  <strong>Hallazgo clave:</strong> Ninguna ToC del corpus global alcanza N5 (Ejemplar). Solo 2 de 78
  calificadas alcanzan N4 (Robusta). La dimensión más débil del corpus es <strong>B1 — Supuestos
  explícitos</strong> (promedio 1.6/10): la mayor oportunidad de mejora en el campo.
</p>

</div>
</div>

<!-- ============================================================
     SECTOR BREAKDOWN
     ============================================================ -->
<div class="content-section">
<div class="content-inner">

<span class="section-label">Composición del repositorio</span>
<h2 class="section-heading">Distribución por sector</h2>

<div class="sector-grid">
  <div class="sector-bar-row"><span class="sector-name">Metodología ToC</span><div class="sector-bar-wrap"><div class="sector-bar" style="width:27%">54</div></div></div>
  <div class="sector-bar-row"><span class="sector-name">Desarrollo Internacional</span><div class="sector-bar-wrap"><div class="sector-bar" style="width:7%">14</div></div></div>
  <div class="sector-bar-row"><span class="sector-name">Nutrición / Seguridad alimentaria</span><div class="sector-bar-wrap"><div class="sector-bar" style="width:6%">12</div></div></div>
  <div class="sector-bar-row"><span class="sector-name">Educación</span><div class="sector-bar-wrap"><div class="sector-bar" style="width:5.5%">11</div></div></div>
  <div class="sector-bar-row"><span class="sector-name">Género / Igualdad</span><div class="sector-bar-wrap"><div class="sector-bar" style="width:5.5%">11</div></div></div>
  <div class="sector-bar-row"><span class="sector-name">Gobernanza</span><div class="sector-bar-wrap"><div class="sector-bar" style="width:5.5%">11</div></div></div>
  <div class="sector-bar-row"><span class="sector-name">Infancia / Derechos</span><div class="sector-bar-wrap"><div class="sector-bar" style="width:5%">10</div></div></div>
  <div class="sector-bar-row"><span class="sector-name">Salud mental / Bienestar</span><div class="sector-bar-wrap"><div class="sector-bar" style="width:4.5%">9</div></div></div>
  <div class="sector-bar-row"><span class="sector-name">Desarrollo económico / Pobreza</span><div class="sector-bar-wrap"><div class="sector-bar" style="width:4.5%">9</div></div></div>
  <div class="sector-bar-row"><span class="sector-name">Empleo / Juventud</span><div class="sector-bar-wrap"><div class="sector-bar" style="width:3.5%">7</div></div></div>
  <div class="sector-bar-row"><span class="sector-name">Otros (19 sectores)</span><div class="sector-bar-wrap"><div class="sector-bar sector-bar--other" style="width:26%">52</div></div></div>
</div>

<div class="lang-org-grid">
  <div class="lang-box">
    <div class="lang-box-title">Idioma</div>
    <div class="lang-item"><span class="lang-flag">EN</span> <span>Inglés</span> <strong>176</strong></div>
    <div class="lang-item"><span class="lang-flag lang-flag--es">ES</span> <span>Español</span> <strong>24</strong></div>
  </div>
  <div class="lang-box">
    <div class="lang-box-title">Tipo de organización</div>
    <div class="lang-item"><span class="org-dot"></span> ONG internacional <strong>40</strong></div>
    <div class="lang-item"><span class="org-dot"></span> Think tank <strong>22+</strong></div>
    <div class="lang-item"><span class="org-dot"></span> ONU / Multilateral <strong>19+</strong></div>
    <div class="lang-item"><span class="org-dot"></span> Fundaciones <strong>18+</strong></div>
    <div class="lang-item"><span class="org-dot"></span> Gobiernos / Academia <strong>10+</strong></div>
  </div>
</div>

</div>
</div>

<!-- ============================================================
     TABLE — REPOSITORIO COMPLETO
     ============================================================ -->
<div class="content-section alt">
<div class="content-inner toc-table-section">

<span class="section-label">200 documentos</span>
<h2 class="section-heading">Explorar el repositorio</h2>
<p>Busque por título, organización o sector. Filtre por nivel IMToC e idioma. Haga clic en el enlace para acceder al documento original.</p>

<div class="toc-filters">
  <input type="text" id="toc-search" class="toc-search-input" placeholder="Buscar por título, organización o sector...">
  <select id="toc-filter-nivel" class="toc-filter-select">
    <option value="">Todos los niveles IMToC</option>
    <option value="ToC Robusta">N4 — ToC Robusta</option>
    <option value="ToC Desarrollada">N3 — ToC Desarrollada</option>
    <option value="ToC Básica">N2 — ToC Básica</option>
    <option value="Proto-ToC">N1 — Proto-ToC</option>
    <option value="">Sin calificar</option>
  </select>
  <select id="toc-filter-idioma" class="toc-filter-select">
    <option value="">Todos los idiomas</option>
    <option value="EN">Inglés</option>
    <option value="ES">Español</option>
  </select>
  <select id="toc-filter-sector" class="toc-filter-select">
    <option value="">Todos los sectores</option>
  </select>
  <div class="toc-filter-count"><span id="toc-count">200</span> documentos</div>
</div>

<div class="toc-table-wrap">
<table class="toc-table" id="toc-table">
  <thead>
    <tr>
      <th class="col-score" data-sort="score">IMToC &#x25B4;</th>
      <th class="col-titulo" data-sort="titulo">Título</th>
      <th class="col-org">Organización</th>
      <th class="col-sector">Sector</th>
      <th class="col-año" data-sort="año">Año</th>
      <th class="col-lang">Idioma</th>
      <th class="col-link">Enlace</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody id="toc-tbody">
  </tbody>
</table>
</div>

</div>
</div>

<!-- ============================================================
     CTA — CONSTRUIR / CALIFICAR
     ============================================================ -->
<div class="content-section">
<div class="content-inner">

<span class="section-label">Servicios CVP EAFIT</span>
<h2 class="section-heading">Construya o califique su Teoría del Cambio</h2>

<p>
  Este repositorio no es solo un archivo de referencia — es la base empírica para un servicio de
  consultoría estructurado. El Centro Valor Público ofrece tres modalidades de trabajo con Teorías del Cambio,
  respaldadas por el IMToC y el análisis de 200 documentos de mejores prácticas globales.
</p>

<div class="toc-services">

  <div class="toc-service-card">
    <div class="toc-service-num">01</div>
    <div class="toc-service-title">Diagnóstico IMToC</div>
    <div class="toc-service-desc">
      Calificamos su Teoría del Cambio existente con el IMToC (10 dimensiones, 100 puntos).
      Recibirá un reporte con su nivel (N1–N5), comparación con el corpus global, y
      las tres brechas prioritarias con acciones concretas de mejora.
    </div>
    <div class="toc-service-output">Entregable: Reporte IMToC con semáforo de brechas y hoja de ruta</div>
  </div>

  <div class="toc-service-card">
    <div class="toc-service-num">02</div>
    <div class="toc-service-title">Construcción de ToC</div>
    <div class="toc-service-desc">
      Facilitamos el proceso de construcción de su Teoría del Cambio desde cero o desde
      un borrador existente. Usamos las mejores prácticas del corpus — incluyendo los documentos
      del repositorio más relevantes para su sector — como referencia y benchmarking.
    </div>
    <div class="toc-service-output">Entregable: ToC documentada con mapa causal y supuestos explícitos</div>
  </div>

  <div class="toc-service-card">
    <div class="toc-service-num">03</div>
    <div class="toc-service-title">Fortalecimiento y SROI</div>
    <div class="toc-service-desc">
      Vinculamos la ToC fortalecida con el análisis SROI completo. Una ToC robusta (N3–N4)
      es el requisito metodológico previo al cálculo del retorno social. Este servicio
      integra ambos procesos de forma coherente.
    </div>
    <div class="toc-service-output">Entregable: ToC + Impact Map + Value Map SROI integrados</div>
  </div>

</div>

<div class="toc-cta-contact">
  <p>
    <strong>¿Su organización tiene una Teoría del Cambio que quiere calificar o mejorar?</strong><br>
    Contáctenos para iniciar el diagnóstico IMToC o para acceder al servicio completo de construcción.
  </p>
  <a href="mailto:cvp@eafit.edu.co" class="btn-primary">Solicitar diagnóstico IMToC</a>
</div>

</div>
</div>

<!-- ============================================================
     JS — TABLE LOGIC
     ============================================================ -->
<script>
(function() {
  const NIVEL_CODE = {
    'ToC Robusta': 'N4',
    'ToC Desarrollada': 'N3',
    'ToC Básica': 'N2',
    'Proto-ToC': 'N1',
  };
  const NIVEL_COLOR = {
    'ToC Robusta': '#0D9488',
    'ToC Desarrollada': '#2563EB',
    'ToC Básica': '#F59E0B',
    'Proto-ToC': '#94A3B8',
  };

  let currentSort = { field: 'score', dir: -1 };
  let filtered = [];

  // Populate sector select
  const sectors = [...new Set(TOC_DATA.map(r => r.sector).filter(Boolean))].sort();
  const selSector = document.getElementById('toc-filter-sector');
  sectors.forEach(s => {
    const opt = document.createElement('option');
    opt.value = s;
    opt.textContent = s;
    selSector.appendChild(opt);
  });

  function scoreCell(score, nivel) {
    if (score == null) return '<td class="col-score toc-unscored">—</td>';
    const color = NIVEL_COLOR[nivel] || '#94A3B8';
    const code = NIVEL_CODE[nivel] || '';
    return `<td class="col-score"><div class="score-badge" style="background:${color}20;color:${color};border:1px solid ${color}40">
      <span class="score-val">${score.toFixed(1)}</span>
      <span class="score-code">${code}</span>
    </div></td>`;
  }

  function renderTable() {
    const tbody = document.getElementById('toc-tbody');
    if (filtered.length === 0) {
      tbody.innerHTML = '<tr><td colspan="7" style="text-align:center;padding:2rem;color:#64748b">No se encontraron documentos con los filtros seleccionados.</td></tr>';
      document.getElementById('toc-count').textContent = '0';
      return;
    }
    document.getElementById('toc-count').textContent = filtered.length;
    tbody.innerHTML = filtered.map(r => {
      const linkCell = r.url
        ? `<td class="col-link"><a href="${r.url}" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="toc-link">Ver &rarr;</a></td>`
        : '<td class="col-link toc-unscored">—</td>';
      const titulo = r.titulo.length > 65 ? r.titulo.slice(0, 65) + '…' : r.titulo;
      const org = r.organizacion.length > 35 ? r.organizacion.slice(0, 35) + '…' : r.organizacion;
      const langBadge = `<span class="lang-badge lang-badge--${r.idioma.toLowerCase()}">${r.idioma}</span>`;
      return `<tr>
        ${scoreCell(r.score, r.nivel)}
        <td class="col-titulo" title="${r.titulo}">${titulo}</td>
        <td class="col-org" title="${r.organizacion}">${org}</td>
        <td class="col-sector">${r.sector || '—'}</td>
        <td class="col-año">${r.año || '—'}</td>
        <td class="col-lang">${langBadge}</td>
        ${linkCell}
      </tr>`;
    }).join('');
  }

  function applyFilters() {
    const q = document.getElementById('toc-search').value.toLowerCase();
    const nivel = document.getElementById('toc-filter-nivel').value;
    const idioma = document.getElementById('toc-filter-idioma').value;
    const sector = document.getElementById('toc-filter-sector').value;

    filtered = TOC_DATA.filter(r => {
      if (q && !(`${r.titulo} ${r.organizacion} ${r.sector}`).toLowerCase().includes(q)) return false;
      if (nivel && r.nivel !== nivel) return false;
      if (idioma && r.idioma !== idioma) return false;
      if (sector && r.sector !== sector) return false;
      return true;
    });

    sortFiltered();
    renderTable();
  }

  function sortFiltered() {
    const f = currentSort.field;
    const d = currentSort.dir;
    filtered.sort((a, b) => {
      let av = a[f], bv = b[f];
      if (f === 'score') {
        av = av == null ? -Infinity : av;
        bv = bv == null ? -Infinity : bv;
        return (av - bv) * d;
      }
      av = (av || '').toString().toLowerCase();
      bv = (bv || '').toString().toLowerCase();
      return av < bv ? -d : av > bv ? d : 0;
    });
  }

  // Events
  document.getElementById('toc-search').addEventListener('input', applyFilters);
  document.getElementById('toc-filter-nivel').addEventListener('change', applyFilters);
  document.getElementById('toc-filter-idioma').addEventListener('change', applyFilters);
  document.getElementById('toc-filter-sector').addEventListener('change', applyFilters);

  document.querySelectorAll('.toc-table th[data-sort]').forEach(th => {
    th.style.cursor = 'pointer';
    th.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const f = th.dataset.sort;
      if (currentSort.field === f) currentSort.dir *= -1;
      else { currentSort.field = f; currentSort.dir = f === 'score' ? -1 : 1; }
      sortFiltered();
      renderTable();
    });
  });

  // Init
  applyFilters();
})();
</script>

<!-- ============================================================
     STYLES
     ============================================================ -->
<style>
/* KPI Grid */
.kpi-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr);
  gap: 1.25rem;
  margin: 2rem 0;
}
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .kpi-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); }
}
.kpi-card {
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 1.5rem;
  text-align: center;
  box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.06);
}
.kpi-num {
  font-size: 2.5rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #0D9488;
  line-height: 1;
  margin-bottom: .4rem;
}
.kpi-label {
  font-size: .8rem;
  color: #64748b;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: .05em;
  font-weight: 500;
}

/* IMToC Domains */
.imtoc-domains {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 1.25rem;
  margin: 2rem 0;
}
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .imtoc-domains { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
}
.imtoc-domain {
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 1.25rem;
  border-top: 3px solid;
}
.imtoc-domain--a { background: #f0fdf4; border-color: #16a34a; }
.imtoc-domain--b { background: #eff6ff; border-color: #2563eb; }
.imtoc-domain--c { background: #fff7ed; border-color: #ea580c; }
.imtoc-domain-header {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  margin-bottom: .5rem;
}
.imtoc-domain-tag { font-size: .7rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .07em; color: #64748b; }
.imtoc-domain-pts { font-size: .75rem; font-weight: 700; color: #0f172a; }
.imtoc-domain-title { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: .75rem; }
.imtoc-dims { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: .35rem; }
.imtoc-dim {
  font-size: .8rem;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .4rem;
  color: #334155;
}
.imtoc-dim-code {
  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
  font-size: .7rem;
  background: #fff;
  padding: .1rem .3rem;
  border-radius: 4px;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  font-weight: 600;
}
.imtoc-dim-pts {
  margin-left: auto;
  font-weight: 700;
  font-size: .7rem;
  color: #94a3b8;
}

/* Levels */
.imtoc-levels {
  display: flex;
  gap: .75rem;
  margin: 1.5rem 0;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.imtoc-level {
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 100px;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 1rem;
  text-align: center;
  border: 1px solid;
}
.imtoc-level--n1 { background: #f8fafc; border-color: #cbd5e1; }
.imtoc-level--n2 { background: #fef3c7; border-color: #f59e0b; }
.imtoc-level--n3 { background: #dbeafe; border-color: #2563eb; }
.imtoc-level--n4 { background: #d1fae5; border-color: #0D9488; }
.imtoc-level--n5 { background: #f0fdf4; border-color: #16a34a; opacity: .55; }
.imtoc-level-band { font-size: .7rem; font-weight: 800; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .07em; color: #64748b; }
.imtoc-level-name { font-size: .85rem; font-weight: 700; margin: .2rem 0; }
.imtoc-level-range { font-size: .7rem; color: #64748b; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; }
.imtoc-level-count { font-size: .7rem; color: #0f172a; font-weight: 600; margin-top: .3rem; }

.imtoc-insight {
  background: #f0fdf4;
  border-left: 3px solid #0D9488;
  padding: 1rem 1.25rem;
  border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;
  margin-top: 1.5rem;
  font-size: .875rem;
}

/* Sector bars */
.sector-grid { margin: 1.5rem 0; }
.sector-bar-row {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: .75rem;
  margin-bottom: .5rem;
  font-size: .8rem;
}
.sector-name { min-width: 200px; color: #334155; }
@media (max-width: 600px) { .sector-name { min-width: 140px; font-size: .72rem; } }
.sector-bar-wrap { flex: 1; background: #f1f5f9; border-radius: 4px; height: 20px; }
.sector-bar {
  height: 100%;
  background: #0D9488;
  border-radius: 4px;
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  padding-left: .4rem;
  color: #fff;
  font-size: .7rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  min-width: 24px;
}
.sector-bar--other { background: #64748b; }

.lang-org-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 1.5rem;
  margin-top: 2rem;
}
@media (max-width: 600px) { .lang-org-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }
.lang-box {
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 1.25rem;
}
.lang-box-title { font-size: .7rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .07em; color: #64748b; margin-bottom: .75rem; }
.lang-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: .5rem; font-size: .85rem; margin-bottom: .4rem; color: #334155; }
.lang-item strong { margin-left: auto; color: #0f172a; }
.lang-flag {
  font-size: .65rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  background: #2563eb;
  color: #fff;
  padding: .1rem .3rem;
  border-radius: 3px;
  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
}
.lang-flag--es { background: #dc2626; }
.org-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: #0D9488; display: inline-block; flex-shrink: 0; }

/* Table */
.toc-table-section { max-width: 100%; }
.toc-filters {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: .75rem;
  margin: 1.5rem 0;
  align-items: center;
}
.toc-search-input {
  flex: 2;
  min-width: 200px;
  padding: .55rem .9rem;
  border: 1px solid #cbd5e1;
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-size: .85rem;
  outline: none;
  transition: border-color .15s;
}
.toc-search-input:focus { border-color: #0D9488; box-shadow: 0 0 0 2px rgba(13,148,136,.15); }
.toc-filter-select {
  flex: 1;
  min-width: 150px;
  padding: .55rem .75rem;
  border: 1px solid #cbd5e1;
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-size: .82rem;
  background: #fff;
  outline: none;
}
.toc-filter-select:focus { border-color: #0D9488; }
.toc-filter-count {
  font-size: .8rem;
  color: #64748b;
  white-space: nowrap;
  font-weight: 500;
}
.toc-filter-count span { font-weight: 700; color: #0D9488; }

.toc-table-wrap { overflow-x: auto; margin-top: .5rem; }
.toc-table {
  width: 100%;
  border-collapse: collapse;
  font-size: .8rem;
}
.toc-table th {
  background: #0f172a;
  color: #fff;
  padding: .6rem .75rem;
  text-align: left;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: .72rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: .05em;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.toc-table th[data-sort]:hover { background: #1e293b; }
.toc-table td {
  padding: .55rem .75rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9;
  vertical-align: middle;
}
.toc-table tr:hover td { background: #f8fafc; }
.toc-table tr:last-child td { border-bottom: none; }

.col-score { width: 80px; text-align: center; }
.col-titulo { max-width: 280px; }
.col-org { max-width: 200px; color: #475569; font-size: .75rem; }
.col-sector { font-size: .75rem; color: #475569; }
.col-año { width: 50px; text-align: center; color: #94a3b8; font-size: .75rem; }
.col-lang { width: 60px; text-align: center; }
.col-link { width: 60px; text-align: center; }
.toc-unscored { color: #cbd5e1; }

.score-badge {
  display: inline-flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center;
  padding: .25rem .4rem;
  border-radius: 6px;
  line-height: 1.1;
  min-width: 44px;
}
.score-val { font-size: .82rem; font-weight: 800; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; }
.score-code { font-size: .62rem; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; }

.lang-badge {
  font-size: .65rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  padding: .15rem .35rem;
  border-radius: 4px;
  font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace;
  background: #dbeafe;
  color: #1d4ed8;
}
.lang-badge--es { background: #fee2e2; color: #b91c1c; }

.toc-link {
  color: #0D9488;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: .75rem;
  text-decoration: none;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.toc-link:hover { text-decoration: underline; }

/* Services */
.toc-services {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 1.25rem;
  margin: 2rem 0;
}
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .toc-services { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }
}
.toc-service-card {
  background: #fff;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: 12px;
  padding: 1.5rem;
  box-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.06);
}
.toc-service-num {
  font-size: .65rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #0D9488;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: .1em;
  margin-bottom: .5rem;
}
.toc-service-title { font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 700; margin-bottom: .75rem; }
.toc-service-desc { font-size: .85rem; color: #475569; line-height: 1.6; }
.toc-service-output {
  margin-top: 1rem;
  font-size: .75rem;
  color: #0D9488;
  font-weight: 600;
  background: #f0fdf4;
  border-radius: 6px;
  padding: .5rem .75rem;
}

.toc-cta-contact {
  text-align: center;
  margin-top: 2.5rem;
  padding: 2rem;
  background: linear-gradient(135deg, #f0fdf4, #eff6ff);
  border-radius: 12px;
  border: 1px solid #d1fae5;
}
.toc-cta-contact p { color: #334155; margin-bottom: 1.25rem; }
.btn-primary {
  display: inline-block;
  background: #0D9488;
  color: #fff;
  padding: .7rem 1.75rem;
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: .875rem;
  text-decoration: none;
  transition: background .15s;
}
.btn-primary:hover { background: #0f766e; color: #fff; }
</style>
```
